title: Can I use Bootstrap Library when developing Monday app
excerpt: Can I use Bootstrap Library when developing Monday app?

posts.author: Harry_X (Harald Carlsten)
posts.cookedHtml: Can I use Bootstrap Library when developing Monday app?

posts.author: kioleanu (Viorel Sfetea)
posts.cookedHtml: Yes, you can use anything you want. See that some UI elements are already provided in this package: GitHub - mondaycom/monday-ui-react-core: Official monday.com UI resources for application development in React.js

posts.author: Harry_X (Harald Carlsten)
posts.cookedHtml: Thank you Kioleanu! Yes! I am aware of that package. Downloaded it. Fire coding a new app for the hackathon!!

posts.author: dipro (Dipro Bhowmik)
posts.cookedHtml:
Thanks for the assist @kioleanu!

Good luck with the hackathon @Harry_X

posts.author: system (system)
posts.cookedHtml: This topic was automatically closed 7 days after the last reply. New replies are no longer allowed.
